---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What's the use case or gap you're running into?

## What you'd like

A description of what you think should exist or change.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other ways to solve this, and why they're not ideal.

## Would you be willing to help build it?

- [ ] Yes, I can write the code
- [ ] Yes, I can help test
- [ ] Just suggesting

## Anything else

Related links, prior art, etc.
